title: Fix score editor normalization on optimizer injection path
description: Optimizer score editor should normalize YAML for both direct yaml_content injection and fallback API load so Dosage/Prescriber hypotheses edit canonical block-scalar YAML instead of escaped prompt blobs. Includes focused verification against Medication Review: Dosage and Medication Review: Prescriber.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Fixed score editor direct YAML normalization so numeric external_id/externalId values are coerced to strings before optimizer agents edit or submit candidate versions. Focused regression added; live Blind Transfer optimizer run has accepted cycle 1 and is continuing.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Follow-up CI fixes after push: imported typing.Any in MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute_test.py for ruff F821, and included the existing procedures dashboard metadata normalization so TypeScript accepts non-string GraphQL metadata payloads. Local checks: ruff execute_test.py passed; dashboard npm run ci:typecheck passed.
